title: Made in India: A Titan Story
originalTitle: Made in India: A Titan Story
overview: In a market ruled by smuggling and foreign brands, a determined Indian man Xerxes Desai, with the help of his team, dares to build a world-class watch from scratch. Battling rejection, failure, and global humiliation, they transform Titan into a symbol of national pride and innovation.

tv.showTitle: Made in India: A Titan Story
tv.originalShowTitle: Made in India: A Titan Story
tv.episodeOverview: Xerxes cracks Titan's pricing puzzle and stabilizes the business, even as personal and professional shifts test the team's confidence. A bold branding leap, powered by Mozart's stirring symphony, transforms Titan into a cultural symbol and ignites explosive growth.
